parameters.query:
INSERT INTO keyword_rankings (project_name, keyword, current_position, previous_position, position_change, search_volume, url_ranking, featured_snippet, recorded_date)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.projectName }}',
  {{ $json.keyword | raw }},
  {{ $json.currentPosition !== null ? $json.currentPosition : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.previousPosition !== null ? $json.previousPosition : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.positionChange }},
  {{ $json.searchVolume }},
  {{ $json.urlRanking ? "'" + $json.urlRanking + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.featuredSnippet }},
  '{{ $json.recordedDate }}'
);
